dialogue_text: to pretend to be two people! Why, there's hardly enough of me left to make _one_ respectable person!
source_excerpt: "Come, there's no use in crying like that!" said Alice to herself, rather sharply; "I advise you to leave off this minute!" She generally gave herself very good advice, (though she very seldom followed it), and sometimes she scolded hers...

speaker.notes: No canonical speaker could be inferred from the source context.
